features.title: Re-designed for Greater Realism
features.description: Veo 3 delivers greater realism and fidelity than ever before, including stunning 4K output and Veo 3's advanced real-world physics simulation with native audio generation. Experience unprecedented visual quality that brings your creative vision to life.
features.imageAlt: Veo 3's enhanced realism with 4K output and real-world physics

subPoints.title: 4K Ultra-High Definition
subPoints.text: Generate breathtaking 4K resolution videos with exceptional detail and clarity, perfect for professional filmmaking and high-end content creation.

subPoints.title: Real-World Physics & Audio
subPoints.text: Advanced physics simulation with synchronized audio generation creates authentic movement, lighting, and soundscapes that mirror reality.

features.title: Follows Prompts Like Never Before
features.description: Improved prompt adherence means more accurate responses to your creative instructions. Veo 3 understands complex creative direction and delivers precisely what you envision, reducing iterations and maximizing creative efficiency.
features.imageAlt: Veo 3's superior prompt following and instruction accuracy

subPoints.title: Enhanced Understanding
subPoints.text: Advanced natural language processing interprets complex creative briefs with nuanced understanding of artistic intent and technical requirements.

subPoints.title: Precision Execution
subPoints.text: Deliver exactly what you describe with minimal back-and-forth, translating detailed prompts into accurate visual representations.

features.title: Improved Creative Control
features.description: New capabilities to achieve unprecedented levels of control, consistency, and creativity. Veo 3 empowers creators with professional-grade tools for precise artistic direction and seamless creative workflows.
features.imageAlt: Veo 3's advanced creative control and consistency features

subPoints.title: Enhanced Consistency
subPoints.text: Maintain visual coherence across scenes with improved character and object recognition, ensuring seamless storytelling continuity.

subPoints.title: Professional Control
subPoints.text: Access filmmaker-grade controls for camera movements, lighting, composition, and pacing to achieve your exact creative vision.

features.title: Motion Master: Define Exact Movement
features.description: Revolutionary Motion Master feature lets you define the exact movement of objects in your video. Select any object and define their path, and Veo 3 will bring them to life with precise, controlled motion that matches your creative intent.
features.imageAlt: Motion Master's precise object movement control in Veo 3

subPoints.title: Path-Driven Animation
subPoints.text: Draw custom movement trajectories for any object or character, creating smooth, deliberate animations with frame-perfect precision.

subPoints.title: Cinematic Camera Work
subPoints.text: Orchestrate complex camera movements including tracking shots, reveals, and dynamic perspectives with professional cinematography standards.

features.title: Video Meets Audio: Native Sound Generation
features.description: Veo 3 is designed to empower filmmakers and storytellers with native audio generation. Add sound effects, ambient noise, and even dialogue to your creations – generating all audio natively for truly immersive multimedia experiences.
features.imageAlt: Veo 3's revolutionary native audio generation capabilities

subPoints.title: Synchronized Sound Design
subPoints.text: Automatically generate contextually appropriate sound effects, ambient audio, and environmental sounds that perfectly match your visual content.

subPoints.title: Natural Dialogue Creation
subPoints.text: Create realistic spoken dialogue with proper synchronization, bringing characters to life with authentic vocal performances and natural speech patterns.

features.title: Best-in-Class Quality & Performance
features.description: Veo 3 delivers exceptional quality, excelling in physics simulation, photorealistic rendering, and precise prompt adherence. Achieve state-of-the-art results in head-to-head comparisons with leading video generation models.
features.imageAlt: Veo 3's superior quality and benchmark performance

subPoints.title: Benchmark Leadership
subPoints.text: Achieves state-of-the-art results in human evaluations, consistently outperforming other video generation models in quality and accuracy.

subPoints.title: Physics Excellence
subPoints.text: Superior physics understanding creates natural object interactions, realistic lighting effects, and believable environmental dynamics.
